messages.content: Is Thomas the Tank Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Thomas the Tank Engine is typically depicted as a medium-sized steam locomotive.
Is Edward the Blue Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Edward the Blue Engine is also typically depicted as a medium-sized steam locomotive.
Is Henry the Green Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Henry the Green Engine is typically depicted as a large steam locomotive.
Is Gordon the Big Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Gordon the Big Engine is typically depicted as a large steam locomotive.
Is James the Red Engine Small, Medium or Large?
James the Red Engine is typically depicted as a medium-sized steam locomotive.
Is Percy the Small Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Percy the Small Engine is typically depicted as a small steam locomotive.
Is Toby the Tram Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Toby the Tram Engine is typically depicted as a small steam tram engine.
Is Duck the Great Western Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Duck the Great Western Engine is typically depicted as a medium-sized steam locomotive.
Is Donald the Scottish Twin Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Donald, one of the Scottish twin engines, is typically depicted as a medium-sized steam locomotive.
Is Douglas the Scottish Twin Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Douglas, the other Scottish twin engine, is also typically depicted as a medium-sized steam locomotive.
Is Oliver the Great Western Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Oliver the Great Western Engine is typically depicted as a small steam locomotive.
Is Emily the Stirling Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Emily the Stirling Engine is typically depicted as a medium-sized steam locomotive.
Is Molly the Yellow Engine Small, Medium or Large?
Molly the Yellow Engine is typically depicted as a medium-sized steam locomotive.
